channel.title: Ecosystem-Design on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Ecosystem-Design on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Sun That Set: Why Apple Is Crushing It And Why Sun’s Identical Playbook Failed 40 Years Ago
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A comparative analysis of the vertical integration strategies used by Apple and Sun Microsystems, focusing on hardware-software synergy and ecosystem control.

item.title: The Most Brilliant Failure in Tech: What Leaders Can Learn from BeOS
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The story of BeOS is a masterclass in platform strategy. Despite its technical superiority, the “Media OS” failed because it lacked one critical component: an ecosystem. This is the story of how Be Inc. almost saved Apple, and why being “better” isn’t always enough to win.

item.title: The Global Business Readiness Index (GBRI)
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The Global Business Readiness Index (GBRI) benchmarks countries by measuring the intersection of capital, execution friction, global operability, and future talent pipelines.

item.title: Beyond the Hype: What Pushkin Industries Teaches Us About Scaling Without Losing Your Soul
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A cautionary case study on Pushkin Industries’ ‘growth at all costs’ gamble, exploring the thin line between aggressive expansion and operational collapse.
